    x11-themes/mojave-gtk-themes: add new port

    Mojave is a macos Mojave theme for GTK 3, GTK 2 and Gnome-Shell.

    Supported Desktop Environments:

    * Cinnamon
    * Gnome-Shell
    * Metacity
    * Xfce

    https://github.com/vinceliuice/Mojave-gtk-theme

    PR:             252772
